creator: Panacea Palm | Dij 🙋🏽‍♂️
source_text:
Easy High Protein Snack Cookie Dough! 🍪💪🏽

ONLY 266 Calories per serve! With 22g of Protein, Same macros as most protein bars🔥

Comment “Cookbook” and I’ll DM you a link to my High Protein Cookbook with 300+ recipes just like & calorie tracking barcodes! 📕👨🏽‍🍳 

Serves 2: 🍪🍪

Calories & Macros 📊
Per Serve: 266 calories 
22g P | 17g C | 13g F

Ingredients👇🏽
- 30g oat flour (finely blended oats)
- 7g almond flour (ground almonds)
- 25g brown stevia (brand: pure via)
- 15g choc chips
- pinch of salt
- 28g melted light butter (brand: lurpak light)
- tsp vanilla extract
- 25g 0 calorie maple syrup (@proteinworks - use code PANACEA for a Discount!)
- 45g vanilla protein powder (I used 23g whey and 23g casein - a whey/casein blend gives the best texture for this recipe) - @proteinworks 

A great lower calorie option for a dessert or late night snack you’re craving something sweet! and packed with protein too! 💪

Comment “Cookbook” and I’ll DM you a link to my High Protein Cookbook with 300+ recipes just like & calorie tracking barcodes! 📕👨🏽‍🍳 

🏷️ #highprotein #cookiedough 
#highproteindessert #lowcaloriedessert #lowcalorie musclefood gymtok
